title: solar panel v.2
description: adds a solar panel, that's it
body:
Need some power? The Solar Panel mod adds a solar panel, and that's it.

(Oh, and you can upgrade it!)

 

All generation, transfer and capacity values are fully configurable for both the base solar panel and for upgrades.

Supports JEI, Jade and The One Probe integrations. 

NOTE: The One Probe does not support 1.20.4 Forge, only Neoforge!

 

Please report any bugs & submit feature requests here, or leave a comment on Curseforge!

 

Credit to TermiteQC for textures!

 

Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks!

 

Planned features:

Improved JEI upgrade tab
Language support
All solar panel colors: (default color configurable)
